# privacy_platform_risk_report

```yaml
api_key_or_token_visible: false
account_avatar_or_name_visible: false
browser_tab_visible: false
quicktime_or_file_window_title_visible: partial
local_path_visible: partial_project_relative_paths_only
platform_data_visible: false
public_place_face_visible: false
product_name_visible: false
install_download_register_bypass_content_visible: false
action_taken:
  - used only safe-cropped new recordings M04/M05/M06
  - did not reuse previous risky visual material
  - cropped out top browser chrome and left sidebar where possible
  - avoided public-place gym/person frames from M04 except dark/neutral preview context
  - used cards for concept-heavy segments to avoid risky UI
remaining_human_review_required:
  - small source text readability
  - partial project-relative path visibility
  - final platform-risk watch-through
final_decision: passed_for_publish_candidate_human_review
```
